close_reason: Implemented pre-commit hook for Cargo.toml/BUCK edition alignment
description: Create a pre-commit check that verifies internal Rust crates have consistent edition settings between Cargo.toml and BUCK files. Should fail if: 1) A crate's Cargo.toml edition differs from its BUCK file edition, 2) A workspace member doesn't use edition.workspace = true, 3) The workspace.package edition differs from BUCK files.
title: Add pre-commit check for Cargo.toml/BUCK edition alignment
